meta.title: Community Assist — Turn community into opportunity | Bali
meta.description: Community Assist is a Bali collective that turns community events into education, raising funds so kids who can't afford school, can. Donate or sponsor a child today.
meta.ogTitle: Community Assist — Turn community into opportunity
meta.ogDescription: A Bali collective turning events into education. Rp 6 million sends one child to school for a whole year. Donate or sponsor a child.

footer.beneficiaries: In support of the Ragam Foundation scholarship program.
